igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Arapaara m — gosi ajụjụ ghe oghe
igbo.explore_3_different_body_systems: Nyochaa usoro ahụ 3 dị iche iche
igbo.identify_3_structures_in_the_spotter_t: Chọpụta ihe owuwu 3 na Ule Spotter
igbo.compare_3_pairs_of_structures: Tụnyere ụzọ abụọ 3 nke ihe owuwu
igbo.206_bones_support_protection_movement_: Ọkpụkpụ 206 — nkwado, nchekwa, mmegharị, nchekwa mineral, mmepụta ọbara.
igbo.houses_meninges_brain_and_cranial_nerv: Ọ na-ebu meninges, ụbụrụ, na oghere akwara ozi isi. Njikọ (coronal, sagittal, lambdoid) na-ejikọta mgbe nwatakịrị gbara afọ 2.
igbo.600_muscles_movement_posture_heat_prod: Akwara 600+ — mmegharị, ọnọdụ ahụ, mmepụta okpomọkụ, nkwụsi ike nkwonkwo.
igbo.heart_60_000_miles_of_vessels_5l_of_bl: Obi, kilomita 60,000 nke akwara ọbara, lita 5 nke ọbara — na-ebuga O₂, nri, homonu; na-ewepụ mkpofu.
igbo.cns_brain_spinal_cord_and_pns_31_spina: CNS (ụbụrụ + eriri azụ) na PNS (ụzọ abụọ 31 nke akwara ozi azụ, ụzọ abụọ 12 nke akwara ozi isi, usoro akwara na-achị onwe ya).
igbo.lightest_sleep_transition_from_wakeful: Ụra kacha dị mfe — mgbanwe site na ịmụ anya. Mmegharị anya nwayọọ nwayọọ, ike akwara na-agbada. Ịma jijiji hypnic (mmegharị myoclonic) bụ ihe nkịtị. A na-akpọte ngwa ngwa. Ebili mmiri vertex dị nkọ na-apụta na EEG.
igbo.true_sleep_begins_core_body_temperatur: Ezigbo ụra na-amalite. Okpomọkụ ime ahụ na-agbada, ọkụkọ obi na-ejie. Sleep spindles (mgbawa thalamocortical) na-echebe ụra ma na-eme ka ncheta mmegharị sie ike. K-complexes bụ ebili mmiri buru ibu na-aza ihe kpalie site na-mpụga.
igbo.deep_slow_wave_sleep_sws_most_restorat: Ụra miri emi/nke ebili mmiri nwayọ (SWS). Ọkwa kacha eweghachi ike. Mmepụta homonu uto na-eru elu. Usoro glymphatic na-ehichapụ mkpofu ụbụrụ (amyloid-β). Nkwado ncheta nkọwa na-eme. Ọ kacha sie ike ịkpọte; ịda mba ụra ma a kpọtee.
igbo.dreaming_stage_brain_is_highly_active_: Ọkwa nrọ. Ụbụrụ na-arụsi ọrụ ike (dị ka ịmụ anya) mana ahụ kwụsịrị (atonia site na mgbochi akwara ozi mmegharị nke azụ ụbụrụ). Mmegharị anya ngwa ngwa nke jikọtara ọnụ. Nhazi ncheta mmetụta uche na idozi nsogbu site na okike. Okirikiri na-atọ ogologo ka abalị na-aga.
igbo.brodmann_areas_map_52_cytoarchitectura: Mpaghara Brodmann na-ese mpaghara 52 nke nhazi mkpụrụ ndụ. Isi cortex mmegharị (mpaghara 4), isi cortex mmetụta ahụ (mpaghara 3,1,2), isi cortex ọhụụ (mpaghara 17), isi cortex nụ (mpaghara 41,42). Cortex prefrontal bụ nke ikpeazụ na-enweta myelin (~afọ 25).
igbo.purkinje_cells_are_among_the_largest_n: Mkpụrụ ndụ Purkinje so na akwara ozi kacha buru ibu, nke ọ bụla na-enweta ihe dị ka 200,000 nke ntinye synaptic. Cortex cerebellar nwere akwa 3: molecular, Purkinje, granular. Nyocha ọhụrụ na-egosi ọrụ ha na nghọta, mmetụta uche, na asụsụ.
igbo.contains_nuclei_for_cranial_nerves_iii: Ọ nwere nuclei maka akwara ozi isi III–XII. Usoro reticular activating (RAS) bụ "mgbanye" nke ụbụrụ — mmebi na-akpata koma. Nkewa piramid na medulla: mgbafe mmegharị na-akọwa njikwa mmegharị nke akụkụ dị iche.
igbo.memory_replay_during_sleep_hippocampal: Nkwughachi ncheta n'oge ụra: akwara ozi hippocampal na-"akwụghachi" ahụmịhe ehihie n'oge ụra N3, na-ebufe ncheta na neocortex. Mkpụrụ ndụ grid na cortex entorhinal na-enye mkpụrụ ndụ ebe hippocampal ntụaka mbara.
igbo.fear_conditioning_pathway_auditory_cor: Ụzọ nkuzi egwu: cortex nụ → amygdala akụkụ → amygdala etiti → hypothalamus (nzaghachi nchekasị) + PAG (ịkwụsị). Mmekọrịta amygdala-prefrontal na-enye ohere njikwa mmetụta uche — ntọala ọgwụgwọ CBT.
igbo.key_nuclei_vpl_vpm_somatosensory_relay: Nuclei dị mkpa: VPL/VPM (mbufe mmetụta ahụ), LGN (mbufe ọhụụ na V1), MGN (mbufe nụ na A1), pulvinar (nlebara anya), otu nuclei ihu (ncheta, okirikiri Papez).
igbo.thermostat_analogy_anterior_hypothalam: Ihe atụ thermostat: hypothalamus ihu na-akpali njụ oyi (mgbasa akwara ọbara, ọsụsọ); hypothalamus azụ na-akpali ọkụ (ịma jijiji, mkpọ akwara ọbara). Ahụ ọkụ = ọkwa e welitere site na prostaglandin site na ọrịa.
igbo.split_brain_experiments_revealed_hemis: Nnwale nkewa ụbụrụ kpughere ọpụrụiche akụkụ: akụkụ aka ekpe = asụsụ, mgbagha; akụkụ aka nri = nhazi mbara, nke zuru oke. A na-ahazi ozi e gosiri otu mpaghara ọhụụ site na akụkụ dị iche.
igbo.dopamine_from_substantia_nigra_modulat: Dopamine site na substantia nigra na-achịkwa ụzọ kpọmkwem (D1, na-akpali) na nke na-adịghị kpọmkwem (D2, na-egbochi). Ịtụfu njikwa a na Parkinson na-akpata nsogbu pụrụ iche nke ịmalite mmegharị.
igbo.returns_interstitial_fluid_absorbs_die: Na-eweghachi mmiri dị n'etiti mkpụrụ ndụ, na-emikpu abụba nri, nleba anya nchebe — akpụ lymph 600–700, thymus, spleen.
igbo.major_visceral_organs_respiration_dige: Akụkụ ahụ ime dị mkpa — iku ume, mgbari nri, ịzacha, njikwa endocrine.
igbo.skin_largest_organ_2m_hair_nails_gland: Akpụkpọ ahụ (akụkụ ahụ kachasị ukwuu, ~2m²), ntutu, mbọ, akpụ — mgbochi, njikwa okpomọkụ, mmetụta, mmepụta vitamin D.
igbo.oxygen_delivery_and_co_removal_12_20_b: Nnyefe oxygen na mwepụ CO₂ — iku ume ~12–20 kwa nkeji, ikuku ~6L kwa nkeji, alveoli nde 300.
igbo.hormone_producing_glands_regulate_meta: Akpụ na-emepụta homonu — na-achịkwa metabolism, uto, ọmụmụ, nchekasị, homeostasis site na ndị ozi kemịkalụ.
igbo.male_and_female_reproductive_organs_ga: Akụkụ ọmụmụ nke nwoke na nwanyị — mmepụta gamete, ime, uto nwa ime, njikwa homonu.
igbo.the_circulatory_system_delivers_deoxyg: Usoro mgbasa ọbara na-ebuga ọbara na-enweghị oxygen na ngụgụ, ebe usoro iku ume na-ejupụta ya oxygen ma wepụ carbon dioxide site na akpụkpọ alveoli-capillary dị mpempe.
igbo.motor_neurons_from_the_nervous_system_: Akwara ozi mmegharị site na usoro akwara na-ahapụ acetylcholine na njikọ akwara-akwara ahụ, na-akpali mkpọ eriri akwara. Na-enweghị akara akwara, akwara ahụ enweghị ike ịmegharị.
igbo.muscles_attach_to_bones_via_tendons_an: Akwara na-arapara na ọkpụkpụ site na tendon ma na-adọkpụ gafee nkwonkwo, na-emepụta usoro lever. Ọkpụkpụ ahụ na-enye lever siri ike; akwara na-enye ike ịdọkpụ.
igbo.the_hypothalamus_pituitary_axis_releas: Axis hypothalamus-pituitary na-ahapụ FSH na LH nke na-achịkwa akụkụ ọmụmụ. Estrogen, progesterone, na testosterone site na akụkụ ọmụmụ na-enyeghachi nzaghachi na usoro endocrine.
igbo.the_lymphatic_system_returns_interstit: Usoro lymph na-eweghachi mmiri dị n'etiti mkpụrụ ndụ na mgbasa ọbara ma na-ezipụ mkpụrụ ndụ nchebe emere na akụkụ lymph. Usoro abụọ na-echekwa homeostasis mmiri ma na-alụso ọrịa ọgụ.
igbo.the_hypothalamus_bridges_the_nervous_a: Hypothalamus na-ejikọ usoro akwara na endocrine — ọ na-ejikọ akara akwara ma na-atụgharị ha ka ọ bụrụ iwu homonu na-achịkwa akpụ pituitary na usoro homonu niile dị n'okpuru ya.
igbo.the_diaphragm_and_intercostal_muscles_: Diaphragm na akwara etiti ọgịrịga na-agbasa ma na-akpakọ oghere obi n'ụzọ anụ ahụ iji megharịa ikuku. Ngụgụ enweghị akwara nke ha ma na-adabere kpamkpam na akwara gbara ya gburugburu.
igbo.the_skin_contains_millions_of_speciali: Akpụkpọ ahụ nwere ọtụtụ nde nsọtụ akwara pụrụ iche na ndị nnata e kpuchiri nke na-achọpụta mmetụ, nrịbe, okpomọkụ, na mgbu, na-eweta data mmetụta mgbe niile na usoro akwara.
igbo.blood_from_the_gi_tract_drains_through: Ọbara site na ụzọ GI na-agafe site na akwara ọbara hepatic portal kpọmkwem na imeju tupu ọ banye na mgbasa izugbe, na-enye imeju ohere ịhazi nri buru ụzọ ma wepụ nsi.
igbo.bone_marrow_blood_cell_production: Mmepụta Mkpụrụ Ndụ Ọbara nke Ụmị Ọkpụkpụ
igbo.red_bone_marrow_inside_the_skeleton_is: Ụmị ọkpụkpụ na-acha ọbara ọbara n'ime ọkpụkpụ bụ ebe ọmụmụ nke mkpụrụ ndụ ọbara niile. A na-emepụta mkpụrụ ndụ ọbara ọbara, mkpụrụ ndụ ọbara ọcha, na platelets niile ebe a site na mmepụta ọbara.
igbo.which_structure_is_most_likely_affecte: Kedu ihe owuwu kacha nwee ike imetụta?
igbo.patellofemoral_pain_syndrome_occurs_wh: Ọrịa mgbu patellofemoral na-eme mgbe ikpere na-adịghị agagharị nke ọma n'ime ọwa ya na femur. Nrịgbu ugboro ugboro site na ịgba ọsọ na-akpata mkpasi cartilage. Ọgwụgwọ gụnyere ime ka quad sie ike, nkwụsi ike ukwu, na mgbanwe mmemme.
igbo.which_structure_is_most_likely_torn: Kedu ihe owuwu kacha nwee ike ịdọwa?
igbo.the_supraspinatus_is_the_most_commonly: Supraspinatus bụ akwara rotator cuff kacha adọwa ugboro ugboro. Ọ na-agba n'okpuru acromion ebe ọ na-enwe ike ịnweta mkpọ na ịdọwa. Ọrụ isi elu dị ka ite agba na-abawanye ihe egwu a nke ukwuu.
igbo.racing_heart_after_exercise: Obi Na-agba Ọsọ Mgbe Mmega Ahụ Gasịrị
igbo.which_structure_controls_the_normal_he: Kedu ihe owuwu na-achịkwa usoro ọkụkọ obi nkịtị?
igbo.the_sa_node_in_the_right_atrium_is_the: Node SA na atrium aka nri bụ pacemaker eke nke obi. N'oge mmega ahụ siri ike, adrenaline nwere ike ịkpata ọkụkọ na-enweghị nsogbu ka ọkụkọ obi na-adazi. A ga-enyocha arrhythmia na-aga n'ihu iji wepụ ọrịa obi nke owuwu.
igbo.carpal_tunnel_syndrome_is_compression_: Ọrịa carpal tunnel bụ mkpakọ nke akwara median n'okpuru flexor retinaculum na nkwonkwo aka. Akwara median na-enye isi mkpịsị aka na mkpịsị aka 3.5 mbụ mmetụta. Iji nkwonkwo aka ugboro ugboro bụ isi ihe egwu.
igbo.what_diagnosis_must_be_urgently_ruled_: Kedu nyocha ọrịa a ga-ewepụrịrị ngwa ngwa?
igbo.painless_lymphadenopathy_with_b_sympto: Ịza akụ lymph na-enweghị mgbu, yana mgbaàmà B (ọsụsọ abalị, ịda ibu, ahụ ọkụ) bụ ihe ngosi ọdịnala nke Hodgkin lymphoma na ndị ntorobịa. Biopsy na-egosi mkpụrụ ndụ Reed-Sternberg na-akwado nyocha ọrịa.
igbo.which_cells_failed_and_what_is_the_eme: Kedu mkpụrụ ndụ dara ada, gịnị bụ ọnọdụ ihe mberede?
igbo.beta_cells_of_islets_of_langerhans_dia: Mkpụrụ ndụ beta nke islets of Langerhans; Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA)
igbo.without_insulin_from_beta_cells_glucos: Na-enweghị insulin site na mkpụrụ ndụ beta, glucose enweghị ike ịbanye na mkpụrụ ndụ. Ahụ na-agba abụba ọkụ, na-emepụta ketones na-eme ka ọbara bụrụ acid. Iku ume Kussmaul na-akwụghachi site na iwepụ CO2. Ọgwụgwọ: mmiri IV, insulin drip, na ndozi electrolyte.
igbo.why_is_the_middle_third_of_the_clavicl: Gịnị mere akụkụ etiti nke atọ nke clavicle ji bụrụ ebe kachasị agbaji?
igbo.the_middle_third_is_thinnest_and_has_n: Akụkụ etiti nke atọ kacha dị gịrịgịrị ma enweghị nkwado akwara
igbo.the_clavicle_is_the_most_frequently_fr: Clavicle bụ ọkpụkpụ kachasị agbaji ugboro ugboro. Akụkụ etiti nke atọ ya kacha dị gịrịgịrị ma enweghị nchekwa akwara. Ike site na ịda n'aka gbatịrị agbatị na-agbakọ n'ebe adịghị ike a. Ọtụtụ na-agwọ site na ekekọ aka.
igbo.why_does_altitude_cause_these_symptoms: Gịnị mere ịdị elu ji akpata mgbaàmà ndị a, kedu ihe owuwu kachasị enwe nrịgbu?
igbo.the_alveoli_and_respiratory_muscles_re: Alveoli na akwara iku ume; oxygen ikuku belatara na-akpata hypoxia
igbo.at_high_altitude_atmospheric_pressure_: N'ebe dị elu, nrịbe ikuku na-agbada, na-ebelata nrịbe akụkụ nke oxygen. Oxygen dị ntakịrị na-agafe akpụkpọ alveoli. Ahụ na-akwụghachi site na iku ume ngwa ngwa na miri emi, na-abawanye ọrụ akwara iku ume.
igbo.carpal_bones_proximal_to_distal: Ọkpụkpụ Nkwonkwo Aka (Nso ruo Ebe Dị Anya)
igbo.follow_a_red_blood_cell_through_the_en: Soro mkpụrụ ndụ ọbara ọbara gafee usoro mgbasa ọbara niile.
igbo.deoxygenated_blood_from_the_body_enter: Ọbara na-enweghị oxygen site na ahụ na-abanye atrium aka nri site na vena cava elu na ala.
igbo.blood_passes_through_the_tricuspid_val: Ọbara na-agafe site na valve tricuspid banye na ventricle aka nri, nke na-agbanye ya n'ebe ngụgụ.
igbo.the_right_ventricle_ejects_blood_throu: Ventricle aka nri na-achụpụ ọbara site na valve pulmonary banye na akwara ọbara pulmonary n'ebe ngụgụ abụọ.
igbo.in_the_alveolar_capillaries_co2_is_rel: N'ime capillaries alveoli, a na-ahapụ CO2 ma weta O2 site na akpụkpọ alveoli dị mpempe.
igbo.freshly_oxygenated_blood_returns_to_th: Ọbara e nwetara oxygen ọhụrụ na-alaghachi na obi site na akwara ọbara pulmonary anọ.
igbo.the_four_pulmonary_veins_empty_oxygena: Akwara ọbara pulmonary anọ na-awụsa ọbara nwere oxygen na atrium aka ekpe, nke na-ejuputa wee kwaa ya site na valve mitral.
igbo.blood_passes_through_the_mitral_valve_: Ọbara na-agafe site na valve mitral banye na ventricle aka ekpe nwere akwara, ọnụ ụlọ kacha ike nke obi.
igbo.the_left_ventricle_powerfully_ejects_b: Ventricle aka ekpe na-achụpụ ọbara ike site na valve aorta banye na aorta, isi okporo ụzọ nke ahụ.
igbo.arteries_branch_into_arterioles_and_ca: Akwara ọbara na-akewa n'ime arterioles na capillaries ebe a na-ebuga O2 na nri ma na-anakọta CO2/mkpofu.
igbo.deoxygenated_blood_returns_through_ven: Ọbara na-enweghị oxygen na-alaghachi site na venules na akwara ọbara, site na enyemaka ngbanye akwara na valve, ruo atrium aka nri.
igbo.trace_the_journey_of_a_breath_of_air_f: Soro njem nke iku ume ikuku site na imi ruo alveoli na azụ.
igbo.air_enters_through_the_nostrils_and_is: Ikuku na-abanye site na oghere imi ma na-ekpo ọkụ, mee ka ọ dị mmiri mmiri, ma zacha ya site na akpụkpọ mucous na turbinates.
igbo.air_passes_through_the_nasopharynx_and: Ikuku na-agafe site na nasopharynx na oropharynx, ụzọ e kekọrịtara na ụzọ mgbari nri.
igbo.air_crosses_the_vocal_cords_in_the_voi: Ikuku na-agafe eriri olu na igbe olu. Epiglottis na-echebe pụọ na nri ịbanye na ụzọ ikuku.
igbo.the_trachea_windpipe_is_reinforced_by_: Akpịrị ikuku na-esiwanye ike site na mgbanaka cartilage nwere ọdịdị C. Cilia na-akwaga mucus elu iji jide mkpofu.
igbo.the_trachea_splits_into_left_and_right: Akpịrị ikuku na-ekewa n'ime bronchi isi aka ekpe na aka nri, nke ọ bụla na-abanye n'otu ngụgụ. Ha na-akewa n'ime bronchioles obere.
igbo.300_million_grape_like_sacs_where_gas_: Akpa nde 300 dị ka mkpụrụ vaịn ebe mgbanwe gas na-eme. O2 na-agbasa n'ime ọbara; CO2 na-agbasa pụọ. Ebe elu ha hà ka ọ dị ka ogige tennis.
igbo.the_diaphragm_relaxes_and_rises_reduci: Diaphragm na-ezu ike ma rịgoo, na-ebelata olu ngụgụ. A na-akwaga ikuku jupụtara CO2 pụọ site na otu ụzọ n'ụzọ dị iche.
igbo.follow_a_meal_from_mouth_through_the_e: Soro nri site n'ọnụ gafee usoro mgbari nri niile.
igbo.teeth_mechanically_break_food_down_sal: Ezé na-agbaji nri n'ụzọ igwe. Amylase nke ọnụ mmiri na-amalite mgbari starch. Ire na-akpụ nri ka ọ bụrụ bolus.
igbo.swallowing_pushes_the_bolus_past_the_e: Ilo na-akwaga bolus gafee epiglottis. Ebili mmiri peristaltic na-akwaga ya n'ala esophagus dị cm 25 n'ihe dị ka sekọnd 8.
igbo.gastric_acid_ph_1_5_3_5_and_pepsin_bre: Acid afọ (pH 1.5-3.5) na pepsin na-agbaji protein. Ịgba na-emepụta chyme n'ime awa 2-4.
igbo.the_first_25cm_of_the_small_intestine_: Cm 25 mbụ nke eriri afọ obere na-enweta bile site na imeju/gallbladder na enzymes site na pancreas.
igbo.most_nutrient_absorption_occurs_here_v: Imikpu nri ka ukwuu na-eme ebe a site na villi na microvilli, na-abawanye ebe elu ugboro 600. Ogologo mita 6-7.
igbo.water_and_electrolytes_are_reabsorbed_: A na-emikpughachi mmiri na electrolytes. Nje eriri afọ na-egbari fiber fọdụrụ, na-emepụta vitamin K na B12.
igbo.waste_is_compacted_and_stored_in_the_r: A na-akpakọ ma chekwaa mkpofu na rectum ruo nnyụ nsị. Njem niile na-ewe awa 24-72.
igbo.trace_a_reflex_arc_from_stimulus_to_re: Soro arc reflex site na ihe kpalie ruo nzaghachi.
igbo.a_sensory_receptor_in_the_skin_detects: Onye nnata mmetụta na akpụkpọ ahụ (dị ka imetụ elu na-ekpo ọkụ) na-achọpụta ihe kpalie mgbu ma na-emepụta akara eletrik.
igbo.the_signal_travels_along_a_sensory_aff: Akara na-aga site na akwara mmetụta (afferent) n'ebe eriri azụ na ọsọ ruo 120 m/s site na nnyefe saltatory.
igbo.in_the_dorsal_horn_the_sensory_neuron_: Na mpi azụ, akwara mmetụta na-eme synapse na interneuron. Maka reflex, akara achọghị iru ụbụrụ.
igbo.the_interneuron_in_the_spinal_gray_mat: Interneuron na anụ isi awọ nke eriri azụ na-ejikọ akara ma bufee ya na akwara mmegharị.
igbo.the_motor_efferent_neuron_carries_the_: Akwara mmegharị (efferent) na-ebu akara iwu site na mpi ihu ruo akwara ebumnuche.
igbo.acetylcholine_released_at_the_neuromus: Acetylcholine e hapụrụ na njikọ akwara-akwara ahụ na-akpata mkpọ akwara. Ị na-adọpụ aka gị tupu ị nwee mmetụta mgbu.
igbo.meanwhile_a_copy_of_the_signal_ascends: N'oge a, otu akara na-arịgo na cortex mmetụta ahụ. Ị na-enwe mmetụta mgbu n'amamihe ihe dị ka sekọnd 0.5 mgbe reflex gasịrị.
igbo.sorry_i_could_not_connect_to_the_ai_tu: Ndo, enweghị m ike ijikọ na onye nkuzi AI ugbu a.
igbo.ai_tutor_is_not_available_in_this_envi: Onye nkuzi AI adịghị na gburugburu ebe a.
igbo.click_any_organ_to_see_its_structure_f: Pịa akụkụ ahụ ọ bụla ka ị hụ owuwu ya, ọrụ ya, na njikọ ya. Debe n'elu maka akara ndị dị mfe; pịa maka nkọwa miri emi.
igbo.step_through_each_major_part_in_pedago: Gafee akụkụ isi ọ bụla n'usoro nkuzi. Ụzọ kacha mma maka ndị na-amụ nke mbụ — ọ na-agụnye owuwu → ọrụ → njikọ n'otu ngafe.
igbo.no_system_works_alone_the_kidney_filte: Ọ dịghị usoro na-arụ ọrụ naanị ya. Akụrụ na-ezacha ọbara (obi na akwara ọbara), na-aza ADH (endocrine), na-ewepụ urea (ngwaahịa mgbari nri). Chọta njikọ.
igbo.ask_a_question_about_the_active_organ_: Jụọ ajụjụ gbasara akụkụ ahụ ma ọ bụ usoro na-arụ ọrụ. Onye nkuzi maara ihe dị na ihuenyo ma na-ahazi azịza dabere na ọkwa klas gị.
igbo.click_the_named_structure_on_the_diagr: Pịa owuwu akpọrọ aha na eserese. Ọ na-ewulite omume ịpị-ihe nke ule AP na nke ọgwụ na-adabere na ya.
igbo.follow_blood_air_food_or_signals_throu: Soro ọbara, ikuku, nri, ma ọ bụ akara gafee ahụ n'usoro. Ụzọ bụ ka eziokwu dịpụrụ adịpụ ji aghọ usoro ị nwere ike iche echiche na ya.
igbo.quick_recall_cards_with_spaced_repetit: Kaadị ncheta ngwa ngwa nwere nkwughachi nke nwere oghere. Nyocha sekọnd isii ugbu a karịrị ịgụghachi nkeji ise echi — nke ahụ bụ mmetụta ule.
igbo.adjust_the_sliders_to_keep_each_body_v: Dozie sliders iji debe mgbanwe ahụ ọ bụla n'usoro ahụike ya, ma hụ ka usoro si arụkọ ọrụ ọnụ iji chekwaa nguzozi.
igbo.reset_all_layers_to_default_skin_only: Tọghachaa akwa niile na ndabara (naanị akpụkpọ)
igbo.switch_between_male_and_female_reprodu: Gbanwee n'etiti anatomi ọmụmụ nwoke na nwanyị
igbo.exception_the_pulmonary_artery_carries: Mgbe ọ bụla: akwara ọbara pulmonary na-ebu ọbara na-enweghị oxygen (acha anụnụ anụnụ), akwara ọbara pulmonary na-ebu ọbara nwere oxygen (acha ọbara ọbara).
igbo.which_structure_has_this_function: Kedu ihe owuwu nwere ọrụ a?
igbo.which_body_system_contains_this_struct: Kedu usoro ahụ nwere owuwu a?
igbo.no_structures_match_your_search: Ọ dịghị ihe owuwu dabara na nchọ gị.
igbo.ask_a_question_about_anatomy_to_get_st: Jụọ ajụjụ gbasara anatomi ka ị malite!
igbo.ask_the_anatomy_ai_tutor_a_question: Jụọ onye nkuzi anatomi AI ajụjụ
igbo.no_tour_available_for_this_system: Enweghị njem dị maka usoro a.
igbo.a_pin_is_placed_on_the_anatomical_figu: A na-etinye pin n'elu ọdịdị anatomi. Chọpụta owuwu ọsọ ọsọ ka i nwere ike! Chọọ crosshair na-akụ na canvas.
igbo.trace_step_by_step_how_blood_flows_air: Soro nzọ ụkwụ ka ọbara si eru, ikuku si emegharị, nri si agbari, ma ọ bụ akara akwara si aga n'ahụ.
igbo.no_flashcards_available_for_this_compl: Enweghị kaadị dị maka ọkwa mgbagwoju anya a.
igbo.all_vital_signs_within_physiologic_ran: Ihe ịrịba ama niile dị mkpa nọ n'usoro ọrụ ahụ.
igbo.compensatory_mechanisms_activated_body: Emeliteela usoro nkwụghachi. Ahụ na-eweghachi ọkwa.
igbo.multiple_systems_strained_risk_of_deco: A gbagburu usoro ọtụtụ. Ihe egwu nke ọdịda.
igbo.acid_base_glucose_thermal_disturbance_: Nsogbu acid-base + glucose + okpomọkụ na-emeri nkwụghachi.
igbo.hypothesis_free_text_which_vital_sign_: Echiche (ederede efu): Kedu ihe ịrịba ama dị mkpa na-anagide mgbanwe kacha nta?
igbo.hold_two_vital_signs_steady_move_the_t: Jide ihe ịrịba ama abụọ dị mkpa kwụsie ike. Kwaa nke atọ. Lelee.
igbo.real_human_ph_range_is_7_35_7_45_inves: Ezigbo usoro pH mmadụ bụ 7.35-7.45. Nyochaa ihe mere o ji dị warara otú ahụ.
igbo.find_two_settings_producing_critical_s: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta ọnọdụ dị egwu. Gịnị ka ha na-ekekọrịta?
igbo.explain_why_homeostasis_is_fragile_to_: Kọwaa ihe mere homeostasis ji sie mfe na mgbanwe ọtụtụ mgbanwe.
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_state_vital_mar: Ndetu imewe: akara dị mkpa nke ọnọdụ 4 dị iche; enweghị akara ụlọ ọgwụ; enweghị mkpughe — site na atụmatụ.
